changelog.title: This Week's Focus
changelog.desc: A no-pressure weekly checklist lives above your Content Planner. Pick 1-3 things to move forward this week, check them off as you go, no dates required.

changelog.title: In Flow Column
changelog.desc: A new column in the Content Planner for ideas that are on your radar but not ready to schedule. Park things here with zero pressure.

changelog.title: AI Instruction Field
changelog.desc: Before generating in the Writing Studio or any content card, add a specific instruction for the AI, keep my voice, punch up the hook, make it shorter, whatever you need.

changelog.title: Tags and Links Saved with Drafts
changelog.desc: Tags and links you add in the Writing Studio now save with your draft so nothing gets lost when you come back to it.

changelog.title: Calendar Ghost Entries Fixed
changelog.desc: Deleted content cards and tasks now fully disappear from the calendar immediately instead of turning black and hanging around.

changelog.title: Content Card Font Updated
changelog.desc: Card titles in the Content Planner now use a cleaner, more readable font that matches the library cards.

changelog.title: Dashboard Tasks Now Load on First Visit
changelog.desc: The On Your Plate widget on the dashboard now shows today and tomorrow tasks immediately on load, no more needing to navigate away and back.
